mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spaces (user_id, name, image_external_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{imageExternalId})
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.external_id, s.user_id, s.name, s.image_external_id, s.created_at FROM spaces s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY
created_at ASC, id ASC
name ASC, created_at DESC, id DESC
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st WHERE st.space_id = s.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK') DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
(SELECT MAX(t.created_at) FROM stock_transactions t JOIN stocks st ON t.stock_id = st.id WHERE st.space_id = s.id) DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC, id DESC
created_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spaces WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT s.external_id AS space_external_id, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT st.item_id) FROM stocks st WHERE st.space_id = s.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS item_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st WHERE st.space_id = s.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS stock_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(st.price, i.price)), 0) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE st.space_id = s.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS total_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st WHERE st.space_id = s.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK' AND st.expiration_date IS NOT NULL AND st.expiration_date >= #{today} AND st.expiration_date <= #{soonCutoff}) AS expiring_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st WHERE st.space_id = s.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK' AND st.expiration_date IS NOT NULL AND st.expiration_date < #{today}) AS expired_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st WHERE st.space_id = s.id AND st.status IN ('DAMAGED', 'LOST')) AS damaged_lost_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shelves sh WHERE sh.space_id = s.id) AS shelf_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boxes b JOIN shelves sh ON b.shelf_id = sh.id WHERE sh.space_id = s.id) AS box_count, (SELECT MAX(t.created_at) FROM stock_transactions t JOIN stocks st ON t.stock_id = st.id WHERE st.space_id = s.id) AS last_activity_at FROM spaces s WHERE s.id IN
#{id}
